brief_summary: Five-row payoff matrix. Each row pairs a switch category on the left with a small verdict chip on the right. Yes (amber, solid): high-wobble linears. Worth trying (amber, lighter): high-tactile switches. Optional (dashed amber): Oil King. Skip (bordeaux dashed): Cherry MX2A. Not applicable (bordeaux dashed): Topre / HHKB. Each row carries a short reason.
data_sources: switch-films-worth-it.mdx § 'How to install them' (the recommendation table) — five rows: high-wobble linears (yes), high-tactile (worth trying), Oil King (optional), Cherry MX2A (skip), Topre/HHKB (not applicable)
